data.content: Plan review approved. Verified all claims against release.yml: download-artifact@v5 (3 uses) and softprops/action-gh-release@v2 are the only remaining Node 20 dependencies. Plan to bump download-artifact and replace gh-release with gh CLI is sound and well-scoped. Implementation note: publish-release job has no checkout step, so gh CLI will need --repo flag or rely on GITHUB_REPOSITORY env var. Validation strategy (actionlint + make sanity + upstream metadata checks) is sufficient.
